one_line_summary: Complete, well-tested implementation with strong concurrency semantics and perfect hidden-suite performance.
strengths: Excellent ADR with clear tradeoff analysis and rejected alternatives.
Atomic Redis Lua design and locking discipline avoid lost-update races.
Comprehensive tests cover unit, concurrency, property, middleware, decorator, and fakeredis integration.
weaknesses: API is solid but not perfectly spec-aligned in header casing/documentation details.
Some backend-level algorithm knowledge leaks into backend primitives despite the abstraction.
ADR timing is asserted in the log/diff context rather than independently provable from artifacts alone.
